title: Take note and talk to your friend

lines.speaker: A
lines.text:
How many people are there in your family?
Who do you live with?
What does your father/mother/brother/sister do?
What is your father/mother/brother/sister like?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text:
There are ______ people in my family.
I live with my ______.
My father is a ______.
He is ______.
My mother is a ______.
She is ______.
My brother/sister is a ______.
He/She is ______.
I love my family.
